person.current_job_title: Software Development Manager at B1 Yönetim Sistemleri
person.headline: Partner at ICITech

job_history.title: Software Development Manager at B1 Yönetim Sistemleri

company.name: ici - Guest Experience Management System
company.description:
ICI is a guest experience solutions  of the latest generation that increase hotel revenue while providing guest satisfaction.

During the pre-stay, stay, post-stay periods, ICI promotes your hotel directly on mobile of the guests, conducts the selling of your services and serves you as a new sales platform for guests to select your hotel.

With the multi-platform support offered by ICI, you increase both your repeat guests and your revenues.

By integrating with your PMS, CRM , ERP and Analytics systems, we deliver complete guest satisfaction. In order to fulfill our new generation guest expertise scheme, please contact us.
company.description_seo: Revolutionize Your Hotel Experience with icibot Experience the future of hospitality with our innovative solutions that streamline operations, enhance guest satisfaction, and boost your revenue. Fast and Effortless Order Management on the Go! Receive orders from anywhere – be it SPA, à la carte, room service, tours, or golf. Ordering services through your mobile app
company.description_ai: icibot is a guest experience system that offers innovative solutions to streamline operations, enhance guest satisfaction, and boost revenue. They provide fast and efficient order management on the Go, allowing customers to receive orders from anywhere.

location.raw_address: Eski Büyükdere Caddesi, İZ PLAZA, Sariyer, Istanbul, TR
